overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person perspective walking along a multi-lane highway shoulder during golden hour. The scene features massive futuristic industrial architecture, passing vehicles, and large digital billboards displaying advertisements on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with industrial district backdrop

events.description: large industrial truck passes by on the left side of the highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right shoulder of the highway, moving toward the industrial tower and overpass

notable_agents.action: large truck passing by in the left lane, moving same direction as ego

entered.detail: tall rectangular industrial structure with cross-bracing, dominating the skyline ahead
metal truss overpass with yellow and black warning stripes spanning the road ahead
large industrial buildings with visible numbering 07, featuring metal scaffolding and pipes
tall utility poles with multiple horizontal crossbars and suspended cables running parallel to the road
large digital billboard displaying pink squirt gun advertisement with text 'It ain't the gun that squirts'

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide elevated highway during golden hour, with a massive industrial tower looming in the distance. The camera walks along the right shoulder as a large truck passes on the left. Digital billboards and industrial structures line the right side while power lines run overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway corridor with continuous digital advertising walls

events.description: slight camera shift as ego adjusts position while continuing forward along the shoulder

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady pace along the highway shoulder, passing the Squirt gun advertisement section

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving ahead in the same direction, maintaining distance

entered.detail: digital billboard displaying 'WET DREAM' in large purple neon letters with additional text below

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the highway, the camera passes the Squirt gun billboard section and approaches the Wet Dream advertisement. The industrial tower remains centered ahead while the overpass structure grows larger in the frame. Sparse traffic continues to move in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach to overpass with commercial advertising

events.description: passing from the Wet Dream billboard section into the All Foods advertisement section

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward, now clearly approaching the overpass structure with the industrial tower still ahead

entered.detail: digital billboard displaying 'ALL FOODS' in red text with image of a person holding a product

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the Wet Dream billboard and enters the All Foods advertisement section. The highway overpass is now much closer, dominating the center of the frame, while the massive industrial tower remains the focal point in the distance. The lighting remains warm golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach directly before overpass structure

events.description: passing the final billboard section and approaching the shadow of the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the shoulder, now very close to the overpass structure with the industrial tower still ahead

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan passing by in the left lane, moving toward the overpass

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera passes the All Foods billboard and approaches directly beneath the highway overpass. The industrial tower is now closer and more detailed, still centered ahead. The road continues under the overpass structure as vehicles pass by on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a futuristic highway shoulder that gradually draws closer to a massive industrial tower and a looming overpass. It begins on a wide elevated road during the golden hour, moving past overhead power lines as a large truck passes on the left. As the camera advances, it glides past a series of digital billboards, transitioning from a Squirt gun advertisement to a Wet Dream display while the distant tower remains centered in the frame. The scene then shifts through the All Foods advertisement section, where the highway overpass grows to dominate the center of the view. Finally, the camera moves directly beneath the heavy structure of the overpass, bringing the detailed industrial tower into closer focus as vehicles continue to stream by on the left.
